techniques.evidence_quote: Angel One says it immediately changed the passwords for its AWS cloud and related applications
some of Angel One's AWS resources were compromised

attack_chain.description: Attacker gained access to Angel One's AWS account, likely via compromised credentials (root cause undisclosed; company rotated AWS passwords in response).
attack_chain.evidence_quote: Angel One says it immediately changed the passwords for its AWS cloud and related applications

attack_chain.description: Attacker accessed client information stored in AWS resources.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: some of Angel One's AWS resources were compromised

attack_chain.description: Stolen client data was posted on a dark web forum, detected by Angel One's dark web monitoring partner on February 27.
attack_chain.evidence_quote: received an email alert from a 'dark web monitoring partner' on February 27, regarding a 'data leakage post'

initial_access_vector: Unknown — Angel One's AWS resources were compromised, likely via stolen/leaked credentials (company rotated AWS passwords in response). No technical details disclosed.
